file_name: REA Group - Simplicity Loans and Advisory - Questionnaire - April 2026.pdf

questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with REA Group and/or Simplicity Loans & Advisory.

Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if REA Group and Simplicity Loans & Advisory are close competitors in the supply of mortgage brokering services for residential and/or commercial loans.

For residential brokers: what other commercial mortgage brokers (or specialist commercial teams) besides Simplicity Loans & Advisory are available for you to refer commercial loan enquiries to, and how do you choose between them? Please outline: i. the most common commercial brokers referred to and why ii. the key factors you consider when selecting a commercial referral partner iii. how easy it is to switch referral partners

For commercial brokers: does REA Group (including through Mortgage Choice) currently refer commercial mortgage enquiries to your business? If so, please outline: i. how important that referral channel is to your business ii. what other alternatives are available to you for generating commercial mortgage enquiries (for example, other referrers, aggregator channels, online advertising) iii. if there any practical constraints to switching to alternatives
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
